name: omniverse-engineering-skillset
description: Make coding agents stronger engineering partners across planning, implementation, review, QA, git workflow, and system design.

interface.shortDescription: Lifecycle engineering workflows plus deep system design
interface.longDescription: Omniverse Engineering Skillset gives coding agents a full engineering workflow layer: brainstorm, plan, implement, debug, review, test, polish, commit, push, capture learnings, and use deep system-design references for production tradeoffs.
defaultPrompt: Use Omniverse to plan and implement this change
Use Omniverse to review this PR before shipping
Use Omniverse to debug this failure and capture the learning
